teachings.name: Open Attention
teachings.description: Immediate: +1 Crystal. Permanent: +2% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +30% one-time bonus.
teachings.rulesText: Immediate: +1 Crystal. Permanent: +2% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +30% one-time bonus.

teachings.name: Prepared Mind
teachings.description: Immediate: +3 AP. Permanent: +3% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +60% one-time bonus.
teachings.rulesText: Immediate: +3 AP. Permanent: +3% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +60% one-time bonus.

teachings.name: Heightened Curiosity
teachings.description: Immediate: +2 Challenge TP. Permanent: +5% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: guaranteed Invocation.
teachings.rulesText: Immediate: +2 Challenge TP. Permanent: +5% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: guaranteed Invocation.

teachings.name: Quiet Knowing
teachings.description: Immediate: +2 Crystals. Permanent: +3% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +45% one-time bonus.
teachings.rulesText: Immediate: +2 Crystals. Permanent: +3% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +45% one-time bonus.

teachings.name: Veil of Uncertainty
teachings.description: When you play a face-up Game Card, there is a 25% chance it becomes face-down instead.
teachings.rulesText: When you play a face-up Game Card, there is a 25% chance it becomes face-down instead.

teachings.name: False Signal
teachings.description: When a card becomes hidden, opponents receive a generic concealment cue.
teachings.rulesText: When a card becomes hidden, opponents receive a generic concealment cue.

teachings.name: Centered Resolve
teachings.description: When you Meditate, your next Challenge gains +1 to all dice rolls (initiative, effort, learning). Does not stack with itself.
teachings.rulesText: When you Meditate, your next Challenge gains +1 to all dice rolls (initiative, effort, learning). Does not stack with itself.

teachings.name: Human Affinity
teachings.description: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, Human cards in Challenges gain +1 AP each.
teachings.rulesText: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, Human cards in Challenges gain +1 AP each.

teachings.name: Plant Affinity
teachings.description: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, when you meditate with 2+ Plant cards in hand, gain +1 Crystal.
teachings.rulesText: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, when you meditate with 2+ Plant cards in hand, gain +1 Crystal.

teachings.name: Animal Affinity
teachings.description: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, +1 to all dice rolls if you committed an Animal card.
teachings.rulesText: Permanent +2 baseline Ascension Power. Additionally, +1 to all dice rolls if you committed an Animal card.

teachings.name: Cosmic Affinity
teachings.description: When you play a Cosmic card in a Challenge, gain +3 AP and +1 Crystal. Once per challenge.
teachings.rulesText: When you play a Cosmic card in a Challenge, gain +3 AP and +1 Crystal. Once per challenge.

teachings.name: Earned Acknowledgement
teachings.description: When you purchase an Earth Advancement, gain +15 Crystals.
teachings.rulesText: When you purchase an Earth Advancement, gain +15 Crystals.

teachings.name: Favourable Exchange
teachings.description: Once per round, the first card sold grants +5 Crystals.
teachings.rulesText: Once per round, the first card sold grants +5 Crystals.

teachings.name: Pilgrim's Insight
teachings.description: If you complete a Mountain Journey followed immediately by a Cave Journey, gain 1 bonus Teaching (tier uses the standard Teaching roll).
teachings.rulesText: If you complete a Mountain Journey followed immediately by a Cave Journey, gain 1 bonus Teaching (tier uses the standard Teaching roll).

teachings.name: Triune Expression
teachings.description: In a Challenge, if you commit 3 different game card types, gain +10 Ascension Power for that Challenge.
teachings.rulesText: In a Challenge, if you commit 3 different game card types, gain +10 Ascension Power for that Challenge.

teachings.name: Emergent Convergence
teachings.description: In a Challenge, if you commit 3 different game card types, generate 1 random Game Card and add it immediately to the Challenge. The card cannot trigger on-play effects or generate additional cards.
teachings.rulesText: In a Challenge, if you commit 3 different game card types, generate 1 random Game Card and add it immediately to the Challenge. The card cannot trigger on-play effects or generate additional cards.

teachings.name: Total Commitment
teachings.description: If you fill all Challenge slots (3 game cards and both Invocation slots), gain 1 Teaching. Once per round.
teachings.rulesText: If you fill all Challenge slots (3 game cards and both Invocation slots), gain 1 Teaching. Once per round.

teachings.name: Ritual Continuance
teachings.description: After you cast 2 Invocations in the same Challenge, generate 1 random Invocation (once per Challenge).
teachings.rulesText: After you cast 2 Invocations in the same Challenge, generate 1 random Invocation (once per Challenge).

teachings.name: Transmutation of Focus
teachings.description: Outside of Challenges, sell exactly 2 Game Cards to generate 1 random Invocation (once per round).
teachings.rulesText: Outside of Challenges, sell exactly 2 Game Cards to generate 1 random Invocation (once per round).

teachings.name: Doctrine of Abundance
teachings.description: Each round, you may buy up to 2 Game Cards and up to 2 Invocations in the shop.
teachings.rulesText: Each round, you may buy up to 2 Game Cards and up to 2 Invocations in the shop.

teachings.name: Rooted Patience
teachings.description: If you meditate on two consecutive turns, gain +1 Teaching on the second meditation. Once per game.
teachings.rulesText: If you meditate on two consecutive turns, gain +1 Teaching on the second meditation. Once per game.

teachings.name: Symbiotic Harmony
teachings.description: In a Challenge, if you play exactly 1 Plant and 1 Animal card together, both gain +4 AP.
teachings.rulesText: In a Challenge, if you play exactly 1 Plant and 1 Animal card together, both gain +4 AP.

teachings.name: Ledger of the Unseen
teachings.description: At the end of each Challenge, gain +10 Ascension Power for each of your cards that stayed hidden the entire Challenge.
teachings.rulesText: At the end of each Challenge, gain +10 Ascension Power for each of your cards that stayed hidden the entire Challenge.

teachings.name: Worldseed Awakening
teachings.description: Ritual: In a Challenge, commit exactly 3 Cosmic game cards. Those cards are removed from the game and the rite ends for you. Activation begins next round. Effect: When you Meditate, gain +50 Ascension Power once per round.
teachings.rulesText: Ritual: In a Challenge, commit exactly 3 Cosmic game cards. Those cards are removed from the game and the rite ends for you. Activation begins next round. Effect: When you Meditate, gain +50 Ascension Power once per round.

teachings.name: Convergence of Paths
teachings.description: Each Earth Advancement you purchase costs 2 fewer Crystals (minimum 1). At game end, gain +3 AP per distinct Earth Advancement you own.
teachings.rulesText: Each Earth Advancement you purchase costs 2 fewer Crystals (minimum 1). At game end, gain +3 AP per distinct Earth Advancement you own.

teachings.name: Awakened Instinct
teachings.description: Your first card each Challenge is always played face-down. At resolution, each hidden card that stayed hidden gains +5 AP.
teachings.rulesText: Your first card each Challenge is always played face-down. At resolution, each hidden card that stayed hidden gains +5 AP.

teachings.name: Lantern of the Unseen
teachings.description: After each commit, reveal 1 random hidden card to you only. If no hidden cards exist, gain +1 Challenge TP.
teachings.rulesText: After each commit, reveal 1 random hidden card to you only. If no hidden cards exist, gain +1 Challenge TP.

teachings.name: Echoes in the Stone
teachings.description: The first Invocation each Challenge grants +3 AP and +1 Challenge TP. The second Invocation grants an additional +1 TP.
teachings.rulesText: The first Invocation each Challenge grants +3 AP and +1 Challenge TP. The second Invocation grants an additional +1 TP.

teachings.name: Breath of the Summit
teachings.description: When you reach any reward threshold in a Challenge, gain +1 Challenge TP. If you reach 2+ thresholds in the same Challenge, also gain +1 Crystal.
teachings.rulesText: When you reach any reward threshold in a Challenge, gain +1 Challenge TP. If you reach 2+ thresholds in the same Challenge, also gain +1 Crystal.

teachings.name: Crown of Endurance
teachings.description: Your first card played each Challenge gains +3 AP. If that card is Common or Uncommon, it gains +5 AP instead. If face-down, +2 more AP.
teachings.rulesText: Your first card played each Challenge gains +3 AP. If that card is Common or Uncommon, it gains +5 AP instead. If face-down, +2 more AP.

teachings.name: Disciplined Study
teachings.description: Immediate: +3 Challenge TP. Permanent: +2% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +35% one-time bonus.
teachings.rulesText: Immediate: +3 Challenge TP. Permanent: +2% meditation invocation chance. Next meditation: +35% one-time bonus.

teachings.name: Wisdom of Low Cards
teachings.description: Cards with AP 5 or less grant double TP value when committed.
teachings.rulesText: Cards with AP 5 or less grant double TP value when committed. Humble cards bring greater wisdom.

teachings.name: Teacher's Insight
teachings.description: When you gain a teaching during a Challenge, also gain +3 AP.
teachings.rulesText: When you gain a teaching during a Challenge, also gain +3 AP. Learning empowers you.

teachings.name: Path of Knowledge
teachings.description: Each TP threshold you cross grants +1 additional basic Teaching.
teachings.rulesText: Each TP threshold you cross grants +1 additional basic Teaching. Wisdom begets more wisdom.

teachings.name: Threshold Mastery
teachings.description: When you cross a TP threshold, gain +8 AP and +1 Crystal.
teachings.rulesText: When you cross a TP threshold, gain +8 AP and +1 Crystal. Master the art of teaching progress.
